title: 2. **meOS Affiliate Program**
summary:
What it is: A program that incentivizes users to promote the meOS iOS app, offering a commission for each successful referral. The program will utilize the GitHub repository to track referrals and manage commissions.
Revenue model: The program will offer a percentage-based commission on sales generated through referrals, with payments made through Stripe.
Time to first dollar: 1-2 weeks
First action: Clawmpson can start by setting up an affiliate program framework using existing meOS infrastruct
